# Flexiv description vendor record

- Upstream: https://github.com/flexivrobotics/flexiv_description.git
- Branch: `humble-v1`
- Pinned commit: `92ef7865d76585e6e08d291bdfe652d32f7740f4`
- License: Apache-2.0 (upstream `LICENSE`)
- Acquired: 2026-07-22
- Use: official Rizon4s and Flexiv-GN01 xacro source for the RMBench Stage 2 simulation.

The submodule is read-only for this project. Generated URDFs are written to the
ignored RMBench runtime bundle by `scripts/rmbench/flexiv/generate_embodiment.py`.
